content: The new dashboard is incredibly slow to load when I have more than 50 projects. It takes almost 10 seconds to render the page.
author: john_doe

content: I love the new dark mode, but the contrast on the secondary buttons is a bit too low. Hard to read the text.
author: sarah_smith

content: Can we get an integration with Jira? Our team uses it heavily and right now we are copying and pasting links manually.
author: mike_jones

content: The CSV upload feature just threw a 500 error when I tried to upload a file with 10,000 rows. Is there a file size limit?
author: alice_williams

content: The analytics page is confusing. The charts don't clearly explain what the Y-axis represents.
author: david_brown

content: Would be great if we could export the clustered results to a PDF report for management.
author: emily_davis

content: Login via Google failed twice today. Had to use email/password instead.
author: chris_wilson

content: The clustering algorithm is amazing! It perfectly grouped all the UI issues together.
author: amanda_taylor

content: Need role-based access control (RBAC). Right now everyone can see everything, which is a security concern for us.
author: james_anderson

content: The typography on the mobile app is too small. Please increase the base font size.
author: jessica_thomas

content: The API rate limits are too restrictive for our enterprise use case.
author: robert_jackson

content: It would be extremely helpful to have a Slack integration that notifies us when a new cluster is formed.
author: laura_white

content: When I click on a cluster, sometimes it doesn't load the associated documents. Just shows a spinning wheel.
author: kevin_harris

content: The onboarding tutorial was very clear and helped me understand the platform quickly.
author: michelle_martin

content: Please add support for SSO via Okta. It's a requirement from our IT department.
author: brian_thompson

content: The search functionality doesn't seem to support fuzzy matching. Typos yield zero results.

content: We need a way to manually merge two clusters if the AI doesn't group them together.
author: daniel_martinez

content: The email notifications are too frequent. Can we have a daily digest option?
author: ashley_robinson

content: Great tool overall, but the pricing page is a bit confusing. Not sure what counts as a 'signal'.
author: jason_clark

content: The export to CSV function seems to be missing the 'author' column.

content: Can we customize the colors of the clusters in the dashboard?
author: matthew_lewis

content: The application crashed when I tried to delete a project.
author: nicole_lee

content: I would like to see a public roadmap of upcoming features.
author: andrew_walker

content: The documentation for the API is outdated. It doesn't mention the new endpoint for manual ingestion.
author: samantha_hall

content: Is it possible to integrate with GitHub issues?
author: ryan_allen

content: The loading animation is a bit distracting. Maybe make it more subtle?

content: We need the ability to filter signals by date range in the dashboard.

content: The password reset link expired too quickly. I didn't get to it in time.

content: The platform is very intuitive. I was up and running in minutes.

content: Can we have a webhook that triggers when a specific keyword is detected in a signal?
